name: gemma-4-e4b/reasoning_pack
description: Placeholder reasoning features for Gemma 4 E4B at residual stream layer 21. Contrastive discovery pending Stage Gate 1 correlation test. Layer mapping shows peak contrastive effect at L27/42 (64% depth), not L21. Logit lens reveals English commitment at L30+ — hybrid MoE commits to language 15 layers later than Qwen3.5 GDN.

validation.method: pending — Stage Gate 1 not yet run on Gemma
validation.notes: CAA at L27 produced null aggregate (0pp for +10 scale, negative control at +2pp). Direction at L27 does not encode 'correctness direction' cleanly. Contrastive features via SAE at L21 not yet extracted for held-out correlation test.
